user_query: I'm organizing a company event and I need to find a suitable venue in the city center. Can you recommend some trendy event spaces in downtown San Francisco? It would also be helpful to gather information about nearby hotels and restaurants for the convenience of our attendees.

TaskList.description: Search for trendy event spaces available for booking in downtown San Francisco.
Gather information about nearby hotels for attendees in downtown San Francisco.
Collect details about restaurants in the vicinity of the selected event spaces.
